scope: SEO/AEO/GEO remediation with warning-only agency monitoring; security excluded by owner direction.

scores.label: Technical SEO
scores.summary: Crawl, metadata, canonical, and document structure health.

scores.label: On-page SEO
scores.summary: Titles, descriptions, internal linking, and service alignment.

scores.label: Live content quality
scores.summary: Current public resource distinctiveness and trust signals; legacy similarity is capped but always shown.

scores.label: Forward publishing readiness
scores.summary: Approved, unpublished pieces before their scheduled release.

scores.label: AEO
scores.summary: Direct answers, readable structure, dates, and Article schema.

scores.label: GEO
scores.summary: Entity clarity, author evidence, supporting sources, and citation readiness.

scores.label: Live health monitoring
scores.summary: Scheduled URL, sitemap, robots, and response checks.

policy.message: SEO, AEO, GEO, GSC, Bing, and live-health findings are advisory warnings only. They never block publishing or deployment.
